hero.subheading: A production-ready template for building enterprise web applications

welcome.title: Welcome to the Template App
welcome.subtitle: A production-ready foundation for building enterprise web applications with FastAPI and Next.js

whatIsThis.title: What is this template?
whatIsThis.description: This is a complete starter kit for building modular, scalable web applications. Clone this repository, customize the app identity, and start building your features—the infrastructure is already done.

items.backend: FastAPI Backend — RESTful API with automatic OpenAPI documentation and modular architecture
items.frontend: Next.js Frontend — React-based UI with App Router, server components, and auto-generated TypeScript SDK
items.auth: Dev stub login — a fake local user for the workshop (no identity provider)
items.storage: Multiple Storage Options — PostgreSQL for relational data, CosmosDB for documents, Azure Blob Storage for files
items.ai: AI Integration — Built-in OpenAI endpoints for chat, extraction, classification, and structured outputs
items.pwa: Progressive Web App — Installable with push notifications and offline support

coreModules.title: Pre-built Core Modules
coreModules.description: These endpoints are ready to use—no coding required:

items.postgresql: PostgreSQL — CRUD operations for relational data
items.cosmosdb: CosmosDB — Document storage with auto-create databases/collections
items.blobStorage: Blob Storage — File upload/download with SAS tokens
items.openai: OpenAI — Chat, extract, classify with GPT models

workflow.title: Development Workflow
workflow.description: Follow this pipeline to build new features:

steps.docs: Document First — Create specs in docs/ with UI mockups and API design
steps.backend: Build Backend — Create custom modules in backend/src/app/modules/custom/
steps.generate: Generate SDK — Run pnpm update-api-client to get typed frontend functions
steps.frontend: Build Frontend — Use the generated SDK to build pages matching your mockups
steps.commit: Test & Commit — Run pre-commit hooks, tests, and update CHANGELOG.md

codexCommands.title: Codex CLI Commands
codexCommands.description: Use these slash commands to accelerate development:

items.buildDocs: /prompts:build-docs — Generate project documentation from requirements documents
items.buildApp: /prompts:build-app FEATURE="name" — Build a complete feature following the pipeline

card.buildDocsDesc: Generate project documentation from requirements documents
card.buildAppDesc: Build a complete feature following the development pipeline

items.docs: 📖 Read the <docsLink>OpenAPI documentation</docsLink> to see all available endpoints
items.extract: 🧪 Try the <extractLink>Extract</extractLink> page to test AI-powered document extraction
items.classify: 🏷️ Try the <classifyLink>Classify</classifyLink> page to test AI-powered classification
items.components: 🧭 Browse the <componentsLink>Components Library</componentsLink> for production-ready UI primitives
items.consumptions: 📊 Check the <consumptionsLink>Consumptions</consumptionsLink> page to monitor API usage

customization.title: Customization Guide
customization.description: When building your app from this template:

keep.title: Keep as-is
keep.items: Authentication system, core modules, middleware, API proxy, i18n infrastructure

replace.title: Replace
replace.items: This home page content, feature pages, custom backend modules

consumptions.description: Inspect recent usage, aggregated totals, and the most expensive paths.

ocrEnhancement.description: Type of OCR enhancement to apply. 'none' disables it.

window.label: Window config
window.description: Configuration for the PDF window processing. If not provided, the PDF will be processed all at once.

windowSize.label: Window size
windowSize.description: Number of pages to process in each window.

windowOverlap.label: Window overlap
windowOverlap.description: Number of pages to overlap between consecutive windows.

info.subtitle: Learn about what this application can do
info.overview: This application provides AI-powered document processing capabilities. Upload documents, extract structured data, classify content into categories, and measure accuracy with automated evaluations. Below you will find a detailed description of each feature.

extract.title: Document Extraction
extract.description: Upload a PDF document and extract structured data from it using AI. Define an output schema that describes the fields you want to extract, and the system will return the data in that exact structure.

capabilities.upload: Upload PDF files and preview them directly in the browser
capabilities.schema: Define a custom JSON schema to control exactly which fields are extracted
capabilities.preview: View extraction results side-by-side with the original document
capabilities.models: Choose from available AI models and configure processing settings

classify.title: Document Classification
classify.description: Classify documents, audio files, or text into categories you define. Create a list of classes with descriptions, and the AI will determine which class the content belongs to.

capabilities.multiFormat: Supports PDF documents, audio files, and plain text as input
capabilities.customClasses: Define your own classification categories with names and descriptions
capabilities.confidence: View the classification result along with metadata and confidence details
capabilities.preprocessing: Configure PDF and audio preprocessing settings for optimal results

evaluate.title: Evaluation & Quality Assurance
evaluate.description: Measure the accuracy of AI extraction and classification by running batch evaluations against ground truth data. Compare results across experiments to track quality improvements over time.

capabilities.extractEval: Run extraction evaluations that compare AI output against ground truth JSON files, calculating precision, recall, and F1 scores
capabilities.classifyEval: Run classification evaluations that measure accuracy across multiple documents and generate confusion matrices
capabilities.history: Browse past experiments, compare metrics, and review detailed per-item results
capabilities.aiSummary: Get AI-generated analysis of errors and recommendations for improving extraction schemas or class definitions

notFound.title: Page Not Found
